focus: [D2-12/D2] command description as auto-trigger keyword surface - does the agent ever pick a specific /design:* command, or collapse to the hub? (corpus: impeccable-main)

graphEvents.label: Do /design command descriptions cause agents to select specific pinned commands, or only wake the sk-design hub?
Advisor replay and registry contracts route natural-language design prompts to the single sk-design skill, not to /design:* commands
Current /design:* descriptions help explicit command/menu use but are not a deterministic auto-trigger surface
impeccable-main uses broad parent trigger plus in-skill subcommand routing, with optional pinned shortcuts when standalone command triggering is desired
Command metadata must label each description's routing role: hub keyword, direct command help, pinned shortcut trigger, or generated docs

Local advisor replay for a motion prompt returned sk-design only, not /design:motion
Local advisor replay for an audit prompt returned sk-design plus sk-code-review, not /design:audit

direction: Treat current /design:* command descriptions as proof that natural-language prompts auto-select specific slash commands
reason: Registry, hub contract, and local advisor replay route natural-language design prompts to sk-design; direct slash commands and future pins are separate surfaces.
